title: NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina: E7770S Section 1 with Poly(A) Isolation using Oligo-dT Beads: Part-2 - cDNA Synthesis
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform library prep steps on 8-48 input total RNA samples according to the attached NEB user guide. This is part-2 of a six part process (first strand and second strand cDNA synthesis). Reagents are combined into two mixtures (mix1 is composed of water + first strand enzyme mix, mix2 is composed of second strand reaction buffer + second strand enzyme mix + water) to reduce the number of transfer steps. A user-specified parameter is available to specify the number of samples in the current run. ---
steps_raw: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform library prep steps on 8-48 input total RNA samples according to the attached NEB user guide. This is part-2 of a six part process (first strand and second strand cDNA synthesis). Reagents are combined into two mixtures (mix1 is composed of water + first strand enzyme mix, mix2 is composed of second strand reaction buffer + second strand enzyme mix + water) to reduce the number of transfer steps. A user-specified parameter is available to specify the number of samples in the current run. ---
Use settings in the OT app to pre-cool the temperature modules to 4 degrees C prior to running this protocol.
The protocol will alert the user to ensure reagents are present on deck in sufficient volume.
The p20 multi will add 10 uL mix1 (water + first strand enzyme mix) to the fragmented, primed poly(A) RNA samples and and mix.
The OT-2 will pause for an off-deck incubation.
The p300 multi will add 60 uL mix2 (second strand reaction buffer + second strand enzyme mix + water) to the first strand reaction and mix.
The OT-2 will finish part-2 notifying the user to proceed with an off-deck incubation.
keywords: NEBNext Ultra II RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina
materials_raw: [Opentrons Filter Tips for the P20 and P300] (https://shop.opentrons.com)
ThermoFisher 96 Well PCR Plate 300 uL Semi-Skirted
Opentrons multi-channel P20 and P300 Gen2 Pipettes (https://shop.opentrons.com/pipettes/)
